Bash(python .claude/skills/gpt-review/scripts/gpt_consult.py --question "Android-specific bug: Expo Go + expo-av + expo-speech. The HIGH_QUALITY preset uses MPEG_4/AAC. What causes this on Android specifically, and what is the correct fix? Current code uses Audio.setAudioModeAsync with shouldDuckAndroid and playThroughEarpieceAndroid. We also call Speech.stop\(\) and wait 300ms before recording. Still fails." --files voxlingo/services/audio.ts voxlingo/services/speech.ts voxlingo/hooks/useTranslation.ts)

Bash(python .claude/skills/gpt-review/scripts/gpt_consult.py --question "Our app records audio and sends it to Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite for transcription+translation. When the user presses the mic for about 1 second without saying anything \(just ambient noise/silence\), Gemini returns a full transcription with made-up text — a whole paragraph of Dutch text that was never spoken. Why does Gemini hallucinate speech from silence/noise? What is the best way to prevent this? Options: 1\) client-side duration/size check, 2\) server-side audio analysis, 3\) prompt engineering, 4\) something else?" --files voxlingo/server/index.ts voxlingo/hooks/useTranslation.ts voxlingo/services/audio.ts)
